children.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
children.description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.

children.name: Elements on the Falls
children.description: Dining with direct view of Niagara Falls. Tourist location but unbeatable views. Part of the day trip package.

children.name: Antler Kitchen
children.description: Canadian game meat restaurant featuring locally sourced venison, bison, and seasonal ingredients. Unique dining experience with rustic atmosphere.
